title: abutilon indicum var. hirtum
intro: Abutilon indicum var. hirtum, also known as the Indian mallow or velvet leaf, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Abutilon indicum var. hirtum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or using the plant's extracts in ointments and creams.
